component.name: Bookokrat
component.summary: Terminal EPUB/PDF reader with Vim-style navigation

description.p: Bookokrat is a fast terminal UI reader for EPUB and PDF documents with a split layout showing the library or table of contents on the left and the document on the right.

ul.li: EPUB and PDF support with optional DJVU rendering
Vim-style keybindings and normal mode for keyboard-driven navigation
Inline comments and annotations stored in persistent YAML files with Markdown export
Full-text search, bookmarks, jump list navigation, and reading history
Image rendering, syntax-highlighted code blocks, and MathML support
Theme selection from a set of Base16 colour palettes with custom theme support
Adjustable margins and distraction-free zen mode
High-performance PDF rendering via the Kitty graphics protocol with SHM image transfer
